figures.caption: Fig. 1: Adaptive robust loss functions ρ(r, α, c) and φ(r, α, c) for different values of α.
Fig. 3: Measured, true, and estimated tractor’s x and y coordinates for one trial of the experiments. The bottom panel illustrates the trajectory followed by a tractor pulling a trailer.
Fig. 2: Normalized estimation error reduction per iteration and mean estimation error reduction under scenario (i) (top) and scenario (ii) (middle).
